ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "box_name" TEXT /* Name of the box to which the rule is attached */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name to identify the rule */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event that triggers the rule */,
  "event_subject" TEXT /* Subject that triggers the rule */,
  "event_object" TEXT /* Object that triggers the rule */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rule is required */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the rule */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rule was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the rule */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the rule */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the rule (e.g., active, inactive, draft) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the rule */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action to be taken when the rule is triggered */,
  "condition_expression" TEXT /* Complex condition expression for the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_event_object FOREIGN KEY ("event_object") REFERENCES event_objects ("event_object_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_event_subject FOREIGN KEY ("event_subject") REFERENCES event_subjects ("event_subject_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_box_name FOREIGN KEY ("box_name") REFERENCES boxes ("box_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "boxes" (
  "box_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box */,
  "box_name" TEXT /* Name of the box */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the box */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the box */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the box was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the box */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the box (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boxes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boxes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the event type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_system_event" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event type is a system-generated event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_types_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_subjects" (
  "event_subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event subject */,
  "event_subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the event subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event subject */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the event subject */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event subject was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the event subject */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_external" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event subject is external */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_subjects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_subjects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_objects" (
  "event_object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event object */,
  "event_object_name" TEXT /* Name of the event object */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event object */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the event object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event object was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the event object */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_external" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event object is external */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_objects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_objects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field to store user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
